parameters.content:
## 1 · Intake
Trigger, fetch from Gmail, flatten into a common shape.

## 2 · Triage
Classify with the LLM, then branch on whether a reply is owed.

## 3 · Draft (RAG)
Embed the email, search the knowledge base, write a grounded reply.

## 4 · Collect
Rejoin both branches and summarise the run.

## 5 · Write back to Gmail
Resolve label names to IDs, apply them, then create drafts where one exists.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🚨 ' + $json.urgent.length + ' urgent email(s) need attention:\n' + $json.urgent.map(u => '• ' + u.from + ' — ' + u.subject).join('\n') }) }}

nodes.name: Gmail: Create Draft
nodes.notes: Creates a DRAFT only. Never sends. A human reviews and presses send.

nodes.name: Fetch Gmail Labels
nodes.notes: Label IDs are account-specific, so resolve names -> IDs at run time.
